creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
We have here one last dependency:
devel/rubygem-cms_scanner

But a newer version of cms_scanner can use a newer nokogiri (0.13.9):
https://rubygems.org/gems/cms_scanner/versions/0.13.9

cms_scanner is not used by any port, maybe we can remove it and fix cms_scanner in a second step.
